commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

The previous logic checked if "npm" appeared in output, but error messages
like "which: npm: Command not found" also contain "npm", causing false
positives. Now uses the exit code from `which` directly.

Fix triangle indicator: use solid filled UP triangle always

Replace 'f'/'g' (outlined/inverted) with 'i' (solid filled UP triangle)
for both board orientations. Font analysis confirmed:
- 'i' = solid filled △ (no inner hole) — correct
- 'f' = outlined/hollow △ (inner hole subtracts fill) — appeared "white"
- 'g' = solid filled ▽ (inverted) — appeared rotated

commit.message:
add exaltation affinity: directional +5 boost for ruling planet's exaltation sign

A sign's ruling planet is exalted in a specific other sign — an aspirational
bond where the listener's foundational energy reveres the idealized version
of that energy. Traditional rulerships (Mars=Aries/Scorpio, Venus=Taurus/Libra,
Mercury=Gemini/Virgo, Moon=Cancer, Sun=Leo, Jupiter=Sag/Pisces, Saturn=Cap/Aqu).

Examples:
  Gemini (Mercury) → Virgo (Mercury exalted): T3c 42% → 47%  floats to T3b range
  Cancer (Moon)    → Taurus (Moon exalted):   T3b 51% → 56%  floats to T3a range
  Leo (Sun)        → Aries (Sun exalted):      T3a 60% → 65%  tops the trine group
  Scorpio (Mars)   → Capricorn (Mars exalted): T3b 51% → 56%

Boost is directional (user→artist only), capped at 69 (T3a ceiling),
computed after all tier logic via score refactor from early-returns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add email+password login, forgot-password recovery

Auth model shift: primary login is now email+password, with magic link
as secondary/recovery option.

Workers:
- POST /auth/password/login: validates email+password against
  admin:members KV using existing PBKDF2 verifyPassword(), returns
  identity/tenant/role/onboarding state for session creation
- Reverse lookup member:tenant:{identityKey} for tenant resolution

Pages:
- POST /api/auth/password/login: proxies to Workers, signs HMAC session
  (same line_session cookie format), sets last_tenant_id cookie,
  returns redirectTo with onboarding awareness
- /forgot-password: email input form using existing magic link
  infrastructure, returnTo points to /admin/settings#password
- /login redesigned: email+password primary form, forgot-password link,
  signup link, magic link and LINE login as secondary options

Safety:
- Existing magic link flow completely preserved (signup + recovery)
- Existing LINE login untouched
- Session format identical (line_session HMAC cookie)
- password_not_set users get clear guidance to use magic link
- tenant_not_found for unknown emails
- onboardingCompleted=false redirects to /admin/onboarding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Qwen3 think-tag handling and optimize train() for T4 GPU

- Strip <think>...</think> tags in _get_generate_fn() so rollout JSON
  parsing works with reasoning models
- Sample 10 corpus chunks (truncated to 1000 chars) instead of passing
  all chunks to synthesis — avoids OOM on small GPUs
- Split token budgets: 2048 for synthesis, 512 for rollouts
- Add per-question progress callback during rollout generation
- Bump to v0.1.3

Simplify Dictionary to term-only list, inject terms into Whisper initialPrompt

injected directly into the LLM formatting prompt.

commit.message:
fix(ingest): use CJS loader to resolve clude-bot export

tsx defaults to ESM but clude-bot only has a CJS export map entry.
Switch to node --require tsx/cjs which transforms TS imports to CJS
requires, resolving the ERR_PACKAGE_PATH_NOT_EXPORTED error.

Add npm run ingest shortcut for convenience.
